# Lusha Wiki

> Official multilingual wiki for Lusha, covering player onboarding, frequently asked questions, clinical trial information, and the universe of the game.

This site is designed to be read by people, search crawlers, and AI agents. Pages are statically generated, organized by topic, and available in multiple languages.

## Core English Pages

- [Home](https://wiki.lusha.care/): Overview of the Lusha Wiki.
- [Getting Started](https://wiki.lusha.care/getting-started/): First steps for new players.
- [FAQ](https://wiki.lusha.care/faq/): Common questions about Lusha.
- [Clinical Trial Info](https://wiki.lusha.care/clinical-trials/): Factual, dated information about clinical trial topics related to Lusha.
- [Universe](https://wiki.lusha.care/universe/): Worldbuilding, lore, characters, places, and concepts.

## Localized Entry Points

- [French](https://wiki.lusha.care/fr/)
- [German](https://wiki.lusha.care/de/)
- [Italian](https://wiki.lusha.care/it/)
- [Spanish](https://wiki.lusha.care/es/)
- [Brazilian Portuguese](https://wiki.lusha.care/pt-br/)
